overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city plaza at dusk. The scene features giant holographic fish advertisements swimming between skyscrapers, wet reflective surfaces, and dense cyberpunk architecture with vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with street furniture

agents.ego_description: walking through the lower plaza toward a curved elevated ramp structure

entered.detail: large curved pedestrian ramp leading upward between buildings
giant glowing orange koi fish hologram swimming across building facade
tall buildings covered in digital billboards and cyan-orange neon signage
yellow and black public seating furniture with people resting

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open plaza at ground level, approaching a massive curved ramp structure. An enormous orange holographic fish swims across the building facades to the right, while neon-lit skyscrapers tower on the left. Sparse pedestrians are visible near street benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved elevated pedestrian walkway with wet reflective flooring

events.description: character begins ascending the curved ramp walkway

agents.ego_description: walking up the curved elevated ramp with wet reflective flooring that mirrors the neon lights

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the ramp pathway

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the curved ramp, with the orange holographic fish now swimming directly overhead. The wet tiled surface reflects the surrounding neon lights and the fish hologram. The plaza furniture falls behind as the elevation increases.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level pedestrian walkway between corporate towers

events.description: large blue holographic fish appears swimming on left building facade

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated walkway as holographic advertisements change from orange to blue

entered.detail: giant glowing blue betta fish hologram swimming across the left building surface

segments.scene_description: Walking along the upper walkway, a massive blue holographic fish suddenly appears on the left building, swimming in parallel to the orange fish now visible to the right. The path continues between towering skyscrapers covered in digital advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular glass-floored observation plaza with geometric framework

events.description: entering the circular glass plaza area with transparent floor
orange holographic fish swims in circular pattern directly overhead

agents.ego_description: walking around the circular glass plaza observing the holographic fish swimming overhead

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt walking ahead on the glass floor

entered.detail: transparent circular glass floor with geometric metal framework revealing lower levels

segments.scene_description: The character enters a distinctive circular plaza with a transparent glass floor showing the level below. The orange holographic fish swims in a circular pattern directly overhead, its light reflecting off the glass surface. The blue fish is no longer visible as the camera faces the circular area.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway continuing past circular plaza

events.description: exiting the circular glass plaza back onto linear walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated walkway away from the circular plaza toward the city center

entered.detail: blue holographic fish visible again swimming on distant left building

segments.scene_description: Exiting the circular plaza, the character continues along the elevated walkway. The blue holographic fish reappears on the left while the orange fish moves back toward the right side of the frame. The path continues through the canyon of neon-lit towers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a ground-level city plaza up onto an elevated walkway, transitioning through a canyon of towering neon skyscrapers and holographic displays. It begins with the character walking across an open plaza toward a massive curved ramp, while an enormous orange holographic fish swims across the building facades to the right. As the character ascends the ramp, the orange fish moves directly overhead, its glow reflecting off the wet tiled surfaces as the ground-level furniture falls away. The scene then shifts to an upper walkway where a massive blue holographic fish appears on the left to swim in parallel with the orange fish, before the path opens into a circular plaza with a transparent glass floor that reflects the orange fish swimming in a loop above. Finally, the camera exits the circular area and continues along the elevated path, with the blue and orange fish drifting back to opposite sides of the frame amidst the dense neon architecture.
